title: ₹15,000/year farmer support — Rythu Bharosa continuation
deadline: First Kharif season after assuming office (June 2024)
summary: Congress promised to continue and enhance the farmer investment support scheme at ₹15,000/year. Payments for Kharif 2024 were delayed significantly; as of late 2024, many farmers had not received the promised amount. The government attributed delays to beneficiary database verification.

sources.label: Rythu Bharosa payments delayed — The Hindu
Farmer protests over delayed payments — Deccan Chronicle
Rythu Bharosa database issue — Telangana Today
